title: Principal AI Engineer - Core Platform
company_focus:
B2B fintech platform providing API-based trading and
investing infrastructure
description:
About Us

DriveWealth is on a mission to make investing easier. We
believe that everyone should have the ability to control
their financial future, and that access to financial markets
should not be limited by geography, wealth, or legacy
systems. We are a global B2B financial technology
organization dedicated to democratizing access to financial
independence around the world. Our mission is realized
through an API-based platform, empowering our partners to
offer seamless investing and trading experiences to clients
worldwide, all from their mobile devices. Our technology
provides partners with a modern, extensible toolkit,
enabling traditional investment workflows and innovative
techniques like fractional share ownership. DriveWealth has
evolved into a global platform offering trading of US
equities, mutual funds, ETFs, fixed income, and options.

There’s never been a better time to build a category-
defining business and there has rarely been a team better
positioned for this opportunity. Our culture blends the pace
and agility of a fintech start-up with the impact,
stability, and discipline of Wall Street. We encourage
creativity and experimentation while ensuring institutional-
grade execution and regulatory compliance in everything we
do. Join us and help build the future of global investing!

About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Principal AI Engineer who will
act as a thought leader and technical owner, driving the
adoption of AI technologies across the organization's core
platform. The primary mission is to architect and deliver
scalable AI products that solve complex, real-world
challenges, particularly those related to foundational APIs,
Brokerage Operations, Customer Service within a regulated
fintech environment. Success requires a strategic mindset to
identify and execute AI-driven innovations and ensure all
solutions are reliable, compliant, and deliver high-quality
outcomes. .

In this role, you will serve as AI champions and lead a team
of AI engineers to drive the adoption of AI across the firm.

What You’ll Do

- Act as a thought leader and advocate for AI technologies,
  inspiring teams and stakeholders to embrace AI-driven
  solutions.
- Architect and deliver scalable AI products that address
  complex, real-world challenges.
- Partner with cross-functional distributed teams to identify
  opportunities for AI integration and drive impactful
  solutions
- Develop ML components where appropriate (e.g.,
  classification, ranking, anomaly detection) and integrate
  them with LLM-based systems for hybrid intelligence.
- Establish robust evaluation and quality gates for agents and
  LLM systems (golden datasets, automated tests, regression
  suites, monitoring for drift/quality).
- Champion best practices for code quality, testing,
  automation, and performance/cost optimization.
- Stay at the forefront of AI advancements, particularly in
  the areas of large language models (LLMs), vector
  databases, and emerging technologies.
- Guide and mentor junior engineers, fostering a culture of
  innovation, collaboration, and technical excellence.
- Drive projects to completion with a strong delivery mindset
  that meets organizational needs.

What You'll Need

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science,
  Engineering, or a related technical field.
- 8+ years of software engineering experience, preferably in
  financial domain
- Strong programming skills, preferably in Python, with a deep
  understanding of software engineering principles
- Expertise in AI technologies, including language models,
  vector databases, and relevant data structures.
- 8–12 years of software engineering experience, with 3+ years
  in an engineering management role
- Working knowledge of databases and messaging technologies
  (e.g., SQL, Redis, Kafka) is a strong plus
- Hands-on experience with at least one LLM agent
  architecture, Agents SDK, Langchain, LlamaIndex.
- Hands-on experience with AWS Strands is preferred.
- Exceptional analytical skills with a proven ability to solve
  complex problems
- A strategic mindset to identify opportunities for AI-driven
  innovation across the organization
- A mature, thoughtful attitude with the ability to operate
  effectively in a collaborative, team-oriented culture
- Deep understanding of AI technologies and their
  applications, with a strong interest in staying current
  with advancements in the field
- A track record of driving AI adoption and delivering
  impactful solutions
- A results-driven approach with a strong focus on execution
  and delivering high-quality outcomes

Preferred, Not Required

- Experience in fintech, brokerage, or other regulated
  industries
- Exposure to cloud-native or AI workflow orchestration
  platforms.
- Experience deploying and scaling retrieval-augmented
  generation (RAG) platforms.

Applicants must be authorized to work for any employer in
the U.S. DriveWealth is unable to sponsor an employment Visa
at this time.

Compensation

Compensation package offerings are based on candidate
experience and technical qualifications, as it relates to
the role. These are identified and determined throughout
your interviewing experience.

Please note: this role is expected to come into our office
on a cadence set by the Hiring Manager/Team.

New York, NY (Hybrid) Pay Range

$250,000 - $290,000 USD

Working at DriveWealth

We do our best work when we’re in the same room. To maintain
the speed our partners expect, our New York and Chicago
teams work in-office 4 days a week. We’ve found that being
physically side-by-side is the only way to solve complex
problems in real-time and stay truly accountable to the
products we ship. When you’re here, you’re working directly
with the people making the decisions. To support that work,
we provide competitive compensation, equity, and a 401(k)
match. We also offer full insurance coverage, a wellness
reimbursement, a company-provided phone, and a personal
development allowance. Finally, we value the time you spend
away from the office with generous PTO, observed holidays,
and extended leave.

How We Think About AI

We leverage AI to work smarter and move faster. We seek AI
curious talent who are proactive about using emerging tools
to increase signal quality, reduce friction and improve
outcomes to deliver product faster, provide better service
to our partners, and to streamline processes. Your ability
to leverage our internal tools and technology to drive
results is as important to us as your core domain expertise.

Compensation

Pay is generally based upon the level, complexity,
responsibility, location and job duties / requirements of
the specific position. We then source candidates with the
requisite skills, expertise, education, training, and
experience.  If you are selected for an interview, please
feel welcome to speak to a recruiter about our compensation
philosophy and other available benefits. This role is
eligible for base, bonus, equity, 401(k) match, and heavily
subsidized benefits and perks.

Equal Employment Opportunity

To build technology and products that are used and loved by
people and solve real-world problems, we need to build a
team with many different perspectives and experiences. We
are an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on
the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender,
sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or
disability status. We encourage candidates from all
backgrounds to apply. Applicants in need of special
assistance or accommodation during the interview process or
in accessing our website may contact us at
recruiting@drivewealth.com.

Agency Disclaimer

DriveWealth does not accept agency resumes. Do not forward
resumes to our jobs alias, employees, or any other
organization location. DriveWealth is not responsible for
any fees related to unsolicited resumes.

Compensation Compensation package offerings are based on
candidate experience and technical qualifications, as it
relates to the role. These are identified and determined
throughout your interviewing experience. Please note: this
role is expected to come into our office on a cadence set by

responsibilities: Act as thought leader and advocate for AI technologies across the organization
Architect and deliver scalable AI products addressing complex real-world challenges
Develop ML components including classification, ranking, and anomaly detection integrated with LLM systems
Establish robust evaluation and quality gates for agents and LLM systems
Partner with cross-functional teams to identify AI integration opportunities
Champion best practices for code quality, testing, automation, and performance optimization
Guide and mentor junior engineers fostering innovation and technical excellence
Drive AI adoption and project delivery with a results-driven mindset
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an ai-first role because it involves hands-on
development of ML components and LLM-based systems,
including classification, ranking, anomaly detection, and
building RAG platforms. The role requires architecting and
delivering scalable AI products with direct work on LLM
agents, vector databases, and hybrid intelligence systems.
